title: LEGO Star Wars 75426 SMART Play: Millennium Falcon Model - Compatible Interactive Toy Set incl. 4 SMART Tags and 4 Minifigures - Gift Idea for 9+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play Compatible set features a Millennium Falcon model with 4 SMART Tags, stud shooters and a hinged top panel for full access to the detailed interior, plus 4 SMART Minifigures
THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to one of the SMART Tags in the starship, a LEGO SMART Brick (not included) powers up Lightsaber training, laser-shooting, refuelling and hyperdrive engagement

4 LEGO SMART MINIFIGURES – A SMART Brick (not included) brings SMART Luke Skywalker with a Lightsaber, SMART Han Solo, SMART Chewbacca and SMART C-3PO minifigures to life by revealing their unique voices and reactions

HOW TO ACTIVATE YOUR SET – A LEGO SMART Brick from an All-in-One set 75421, 75423 or 75427 (sold separately) is required to enable immersive play functions (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate iconic scenes: help Luke Skywalker learn the ways of the Force, role-play a game of dejarik, transport the unstable fuel container and jump to lightspeed to outrun the Empire
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this interactive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 9+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors
DIGITAL INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app guides your child on an intuitive adventure that lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, as well as save and track their progress
description: From the manufacturer Iconic Star Wars vehicle Cool building toy for battles and imaginative play Role-play as iconic characters on the Millennium Falcon with this LEGO Star Wars SMART Play Compatible Set for kids. Play holochess, practice Lightsaber skills, launch into battles and more. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
